name: Groq
description: Groq provides ultra-fast LLM inference with an OpenAI-compatible API. Generate chat completions, transcribe audio, and translate audio to English using models like Llama 3.3, Mixtral, and Whisper. Groq's custom LPU hardware delivers the fastest token generation speeds available.

capabilities.name: chat_completion_create
capabilities.description: Generate a chat completion using Groq's ultra-fast inference. Supports tool calling, JSON mode, streaming, and multiple open-source models.

capabilities.name: audio_transcription_create
capabilities.description: Transcribe audio to text using Whisper Large V3 on Groq hardware. Returns transcribed text with optional timestamps.

capabilities.name: audio_translation_create
capabilities.description: Translate audio from any supported language into English text using Whisper Large V3.

capabilities.name: models_list
capabilities.description: List all models currently available on Groq's inference platform.
